basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Programmer, Block Coordinator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jila Panchayat Bastar (District Panchayat Bastar), Jagdalpur, Chhattisgarh has released an official recruitment notification (Advertisement No. 1765/Jipen/Bharti/Stha/2026–27, dated 23 June 2026) inviting applications for 3 contractual (Sanvida) posts under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Gramin (PMAY-G) scheme. Eligible residents of Chhattisgarh can apply by sending applications through Registered Post / Speed Post only on or before 10 July 2026 by 5:30 PM. Posts are based at the District and Janpad Panchayat level in Bastar district.

important_dates.application_start_date: From the date of notification publication

application_fee.details: The official notification for Jila Panchayat Bastar Bharti 2026 specifies that candidates must attach two self-addressed envelopes with postal stamps of ₹40 each (total ₹80) along with the application form. No separate exam fee has been mentioned. Candidates are advised not to send cash or demand drafts.

age_limit.details: Before applying for the Jila Panchayat Bastar Contractual Recruitment 2026, candidates must verify they meet both educational qualification and age requirements. Age will be calculated as on 1 January 2026, and relaxation will apply as per Chhattisgarh government orders. The minimum age is 21 years and the maximum age is 35 years for general category candidates. | Educational Qualification: | BE / B.Tech in Computer Science / Electronics / IT from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks; OR MCA / M.Sc. (Computer Science / IT) / M.Sc. (IT) with minimum 60% marks. | Experience: Minimum 3 years of government or non-government experience in implementing various schemes. | Priority: Candidates with experience in Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Gramin will be given preference. | Educational Qualification: | BE / B.Tech from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks; OR Post-Graduate degree (Graduation with minimum 60% marks) from a recognized university. | Experience: Minimum 2 years of government or non-government experience in implementing various schemes. | Priority: (1) Teaching institution experience preferred; (2) Construction/civil work experience preferred. | Age relaxation will be applicable as per the Chhattisgarh government's standing orders. Age is computed as on 1 January 2026.

qualification.details: Before applying for the Jila Panchayat Bastar Contractual Recruitment 2026 , candidates must verify they meet both educational qualification and age requirements. Age will be calculated as on 1 January 2026 , and relaxation will apply as per Chhattisgarh government orders. The minimum age is 21 years and the maximum age is 35 years for general category candidates.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Vikas Khand Samanvayak (Sanvida) – Janpad Panchayat Level

category_wise_breakdown.post_name: Vikas Khand Samanvayak (Sanvida) – Janpad Panchayat Level

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Vikas Khand Samanvayak (Sanvida) – Janpad Panchayat Level

salary_details.details: Candidates selected under the Jila Panchayat Bastar Sanvida Niyukti 2026 will receive a fixed contractual remuneration as specified in the official notification. The pay is governed by Chhattisgarh Civilian Service (Contractual Appointment) Rules 2012 and associated government orders. | No pension, gratuity, or other retirement benefits will be admissible for contractual service appointments. The contract is initially for 1 year and may be extended based on performance and government requirements.

selection_process: Higher Secondary (12th) percentage (out of 100) weightage 20 Marks
Mandatory educational qualification percentage (out of 100) weightage 30 Marks
Government & Non-Government work experience (max 20 marks; 4 marks per year) 20 Marks
The selection for Jila Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 is merit-based with multiple evaluation stages. A merit list will be prepared based on aggregate scores from academic marks
and interview. There is no written examination in the traditional sense; instead
a skill-based computer test and interview are conducted.
Application Scrutiny: Applications received by Speed Post are verified for completeness and eligibility. Merit List Preparation: Based on academic scores

and documents submitted. Shortlisting: Candidates are shortlisted at a ratio of 1:10 (ten candidates per vacancy) for the computer practical test. Computer Practical Test: A practical computer proficiency test is conducted; carries 20 marks weightage. Interview: The top-scoring candidates appear for an interview (10 marks). Final Merit & Appointment: The candidate with the highest aggregate score is recommended for appointment. In case of a tie

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Health Programmer (Lokiya) and Block Level Assistant posts in the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Health Programmer (Lokiya) post is Rs. 35160 per month, and for the Block Level Assistant post, it is Rs. 30875 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection criteria for the District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Merit List and a Computer Practical Test or Skill Test.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Panchayat Bastar, which is www.bastar.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for District Panchayat Bastar?
faq.answer: The official website for District Panchayat Bastar is www.bastar.gov.in. You can find all relevant information and updates here.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 216 / जिप / भर्ती / स्था / 2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Health Programmer (Lokiya) and Block Level Assistant are on a contractual basis.
